victories.title: Victory Card
victories.description: You encounter a pack of wild Pokémon! Throw the dice in order to capture one of them. If the first roll is 1, roll again: 1,2 = Growlithe; 3,4 = Sunkern; 5,6 = Tyrogue. If the first roll is 6, roll again: 1,2,3 = Girafarig; 4 = Magnemite; 5,6 = M. Fossil.

victories.title: Victory Card
victories.description: Well done! You may draw three event cards from the event pile! x3

victories.title: Victory Card
victories.description: You encounter a pack of wild Pokémon! Throw the dice in order to capture one of them. If the first roll is 3, roll again: 1,2 = Scyther; 3,4 = Krabby; 5,6 = Ekans. If the first roll is 5, roll again: 1,2,3 = Spearow; 4 = Voltorb; 5,6 = Kangaskhan.

victories.title: Victory Card
victories.description: Congratulations! You receive a Voltorb!

victories.title: Victory Card
victories.description: If any other player has more Pokéballs than you, you receive a Pokéball. Otherwise, you receive a Miracle Stone. +1

victories.title: Gift Pokémon
victories.description: You may choose one of the above Pokémon to receive as a gift! Girafarig, Doduo, Growlithe, Magnemite, Koffing, Sunkern, M. Fossil, Gligar, Tyrogue.

victories.title: Gift Pokémon

victories.description: Throw the dice to capture this Pokémon! 2 You cannot rethrow the capture dice.
